current_chart_value: Daisy Mackey, a 78-year-old female, requires home health admission primarily due to her diagnosis of malignant neoplasm of the dome of the bladder (ICD-10 Code C67.1) and her secondary condition of ulcerative chronic rectosigmoiditis with fistula (ICD-10 Code K51.313). Following a recent surgical intervention, which included robotic surgery for the resection and management of her malignant tumor and associated complications, Ms. Mackey is experiencing significant functional limitations, specifically related to woun
proposed_value: Skilled nursing for wound care. Skilled nursing to perform daily Pack wound with iodoform gauze, ensuring loose packing to fill the wound bed without overpacking. Cleanse wound with normal saline. Wound measures approximately 10 cm depth X 3 cm width. Cover with appropriate sterile secondary dressing (e.g., dry gauze or ABD pad).
